title: [merge-conflict] worktree-worker24: rpl_root.c
close_reason: Updated rpl_root.c with prefix_len=128 in init and len >= 64 in set_prefix for full 128-bit DODAGID per spec/04-network.md:6.1 and previous htto fix. Merged best of worker24 and worker7 implementations (trickle start + full event handling). Resolved related merge comment in xiao_s3 board conf during rebase attempt.
